_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: miR34a levels were significantly downregulated when Tp53 was knocked down, and knockdown of p53 with siRNA caused a modest upregulation of c-Met protein levels
details: Knockdown of p53 caused modest upregulation of c-Met protein levels and significantly downregulated miR34a levels
